inputs.label: Preload Force
inputs.businessContext: The tensile force applied to the bolt during tightening, typically achieved by torque or tension.

businessContext_i18n.en: The tensile force applied to the bolt during tightening, typically achieved by torque or tension.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıkma sırasında cıvataya uygulanan çekme kuvveti, genellikle tork veya gerilim ile elde edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die während des Anziehens auf die Schraube ausgeübte Zugkraft, typischerweise durch Drehmoment oder Spannung erreicht.

inputs.label: Grip Length
inputs.businessContext: The length of the bolt between the nut and the bolt head, or the clamped length.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length of the bolt between the nut and the bolt head, or the clamped length.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Somun ile cıvata başı arasındaki cıvata uzunluğu veya sıkıştırılan uzunluk.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Länge des Bolzens zwischen Mutter und Kopf oder die Klemmspannungslänge.

inputs.label: Tensile Stress Area
inputs.businessContext: The effective cross-sectional area of the bolt thread under tension.

businessContext_i18n.en: The effective cross-sectional area of the bolt thread under tension.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cıvata dişinin çekme altındaki etkili kesit alanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der effektive Querschnitt des Bolzengewindes unter Zug.

inputs.label: Modulus of Elasticity
inputs.businessContext: Young's modulus of the bolt material, e.g., 200,000 N/mm² for steel.

businessContext_i18n.en: Young's modulus of the bolt material, e.g., 200,000 N/mm² for steel.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cıvata malzemesinin Young modülü, örn. çelik için 200.000 N/mm².
businessContext_i18n.de: Elastizitätsmodul des Bolzenmaterials, z. B. 200.000 N/mm² für Stahl.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
